text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for the training session. I will now
return to the dormitory, as schedu—
Wham!
Gyaaah!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rear collision confirmed. Rice's head has made
contact with my back.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh no! I'm so sorry for bumping into you!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh no... I thought I wouldn't cause trouble for
anyone if I ran at night...

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: No, there's no trouble—

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, uh... I'm really, really, sorry!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I have failed to convey my intent. It seems that
my own mistake has created a bug.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I propose a change to my scheduled
return home. Requesting permission to follow
after Rice Shower and correct this
misunderstanding.
choice_data_list: I'll go tell her. You should rest.
I'll go tell her. You should rest.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I propose a change to my scheduled
return home. Requesting permission to follow
after Rice and correct this misunderstanding.
choice_data_list: I'll go tell her. You should rest.
I'll go tell her. You should rest.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much. Commencing bug fix.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... Rice... please wait.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon! No, I don't want to cause you any more
trouble! You need to hurry and get away from me
before...

The chase carries on until both of them are
completely out of energy.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
I understand. Thank you for taking my physical
condition into account.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Please give this sports drink to Rice.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Earlier, I detected perspiration on her forehead
and dry lips. She requires urgent rehydration.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Rice is someone I care about. I don't want to see
her push herself to the point of collapse.

Afterward, I catch up to Rice Shower on my
bicycle and clear up the misunderstanding while
giving her Boubon's drink.
